title: Editor + History (list, open, edit-save, copy, isolation)

task.description: Implement /history list and /editor/[id] editable draft view. Add APIs to list drafts (per user), fetch one draft, and save editedText. Add copy-to-clipboard with success/failure/empty handling.
acceptance_criteria: History shows items with createdAt + request summary; empty history shows EmptyState with CTA to /generate.
Opening a history item routes to /editor/[id] and loads stored latest text (editedText if present else generatedText).
Editing draft and navigating away then reopening persists changes (updatedText saved via API).
Copy copies current editor text and shows “Copied” state; empty editor shows “Nothing to copy” and does not attempt clipboard write.
Accessing another user’s draft ID returns 404 from API and editor shows not-found UI state (no content leak).

definition_of_done: API filters by session userId and returns 404 when not owned
Editor shows loading skeleton, error banner, and not-found empty state
ui_requirements: History: list of Card rows, each clickable with ghost Button. Editor: Card with Textarea full-width min-h-[60vh], save on debounce or explicit Save Button (secondary). Copy Button default with transient “Copied” Badge. Error banner + retry; loading skeleton; not-found EmptyState with CTA to History/Generate.
